data.name: dataGridViewProfile.ToolTip
data.value: List of loaded profiles. Select a row to edit it below; the checkbox toggles its plot and the swatch shows its line color.

data.name: buttonLower.ToolTip
data.value: Move the selected profile down one position in the list.

data.name: buttonUpper.ToolTip
data.value: Move the selected profile up one position in the list.

data.name: button1.ToolTip
data.value: Delete ALL loaded profiles (asks for confirmation).

data.name: textBoxComment.ToolTip
data.value: Free-text comment stored with the selected profile; does not affect processing.

data.name: textBoxProfileName.ToolTip
data.value: Display name of the selected profile (shown in lists and legends).

data.name: colorControlLineColor.ToolTip
data.value: Set the line (plot) color of the selected profile.

data.name: colorControlLineColor.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the line (plot) color of the selected profile.

data.name: numericBoxLineWidth.ToolTip
data.value: Set the plot line width of the selected profile, in points (pt).

data.name: checkBoxShowBackgroundProfile.ToolTip
data.value: Show/hide the background curve on the graph (background subtraction must be on).

data.name: comboBoxBackgroundReferrence.ToolTip
data.value: Select which loaded profile is used as the reference background.

data.name: buttonBackgroundAutoDetectBG.ToolTip
data.value: Automatically place the specified number of background points along the profile.

data.name: radioButtonBackgroundReferrence.ToolTip
data.value: Use another profile as the reference background to subtract.

data.name: radioButtonBagkgroundBSpline.ToolTip
data.value: Define the background as a B-spline curve through manually/auto-placed points.

data.name: checkBoxSmoothing.ToolTip
data.value: Step 3: Smooth the profile using a Savitzky-Golay filter.

data.name: checkBoxBackgroundSubtraction.ToolTip
data.value: Step 6: Subtract a background curve from the profile.

data.name: buttonChangeSourceXAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Apply the edited horizontal-axis source settings (and exposure time) to the selected profile.

data.name: xAxisUserControl.ToolTip
data.value: Edit the source horizontal-axis settings (axis type 2theta/d/energy/TOF, radiation source, wavelength, takeoff angle). Apply with 'Change'.

data.name: checkBoxShiftHorizontalAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Shift the entire profile along the horizontal axis by a fixed amount.

data.name: numericBoxShiftHorizontalAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Amount to shift the profile along the horizontal axis (in horizontal-axis units).

data.name: numericBoxExposureTime.ToolTip
data.value: Exposure time in seconds, used to convert intensity to counts-per-second (CPS) on the vertical axis.

data.name: radioButtonNormarizeMaximum.ToolTip
data.value: Normalize so that the MAXIMUM intensity in the range equals the target value.

data.name: radioButtonNormarizeAverage.ToolTip
data.value: Normalize so that the AVERAGE intensity in the range equals the target value.

data.name: listBoxTwoProfiles1.ToolTip
data.value: Select the first (primary) profile for the operation; allows multiple selection in Average mode.

data.name: listBoxTwoProfiles2.ToolTip
data.value: Select the second profile for two-profile operations.

data.name: checkBoxTwoThetaOffset.ToolTip
data.value: Step 1: Apply a 2theta-angle offset Delta(2theta) = c0 + c1*tan(theta) + c2*tan^2(theta) (angle-dispersive data only).

data.name: numericBoxTwhoThetaOffsetCoeff0.ToolTip
data.value: Constant term c0 of the 2theta offset Delta(2theta) = c0 + c1*tan(theta) + c2*tan^2(theta), in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxTwhoThetaOffsetCoeff1.ToolTip
data.value: Coefficient c1 of the tan(theta) term in the 2theta offset, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxTwhoThetaOffsetCoeff2.ToolTip
data.value: Coefficient c2 of the tan^2(theta) term in the 2theta offset, in degrees.

data.name: buttonTwoThetaCalibration.ToolTip
data.value: Open/close the calibration window to determine the 2theta offset from an internal standard.

data.name: buttonTwoThetaOffsetReset.ToolTip
data.value: Reset all three 2theta offset coefficients (c0, c1, c2) to zero.

data.name: checkBoxMaskingMode.ToolTip
data.value: Step 2: Mask selected x-ranges and replace them by polynomial interpolation (e.g. to remove artifacts).

data.name: checkBoxShowMaskedRange.ToolTip
data.value: Enable setting/showing masking ranges directly on the graph with the mouse.

data.name: numericBoxInterpolationOrder.ToolTip
data.value: Polynomial order used to interpolate across masked ranges (0-5). Higher = more flexible curve.

data.name: numericBoxInterpolationPoints.ToolTip
data.value: Number of data points taken from EACH side of the masked range to fit the interpolation (used with the polynomial order). Larger = wider fitting window.

data.name: listBoxMaskRanges.ToolTip
data.value: List of masking ranges (start-end on the horizontal axis). Select one to highlight it; drop a .mas file to load ranges.

data.name: buttonDeleteMask.ToolTip
data.value: Delete the masking range selected in the list.

data.name: buttonDeleteAllMask.ToolTip
data.value: Delete all masking ranges of this profile.

data.name: numericBoxSmoothingSavitzkyAndGolayM.ToolTip
data.value: Savitzky-Golay window half-width (points on each side). Larger = stronger smoothing.

data.name: numericBoxSmoothingSavitzkyAndGolayN.ToolTip
data.value: Savitzky-Golay polynomial order (0-5). Higher preserves peaks but smooths less.

data.name: checkBoxBandPassFilter.ToolTip
data.value: Step 4: Apply an FFT bandpass filter to suppress unwanted frequency components.

data.name: checkBoxLowPassFilter.ToolTip
data.value: Enable a low-pass filter: remove high-frequency (short-period noise) components above the threshold.

data.name: numericBoxLowPass.ToolTip
data.value: Low-pass cutoff frequency (in 1/[horizontal-axis unit]); components above it are removed. Range adapts to the data.

data.name: checkBoxHighPassFilter.ToolTip
data.value: Enable a high-pass filter: remove low-frequency (long-period) components below the threshold.

data.name: numericBoxHighPass.ToolTip
data.value: High-pass cutoff frequency (in 1/[horizontal-axis unit]); components below it are removed. Range adapts to the data.

data.name: checkBoxRemoveKalpha2.Text
data.value: 5. Remove Kα2 (if Kα1 is used as X-ray source)

data.name: checkBoxRemoveKalpha2.ToolTip
data.value: Step 5: Strip the Kalpha2 contribution from the profile (only when the source is an X-ray Kalpha1 line).

data.name: numericBoxBgPointsNumber.ToolTip
data.value: Number of background points (3-50) used for auto-detection / B-spline fitting.

data.name: numericBoxBackgroundReferrenceScale.ToolTip
data.value: Scale factor multiplied to the reference background before subtraction.

data.name: checkBoxNormarizeIntensity.ToolTip
data.value: Step 7: Normalize the intensity within a chosen x-range to a target value.

data.name: numericBoxNormarizeRangeLow.ToolTip
data.value: Lower bound (horizontal-axis units) of the range used to compute the normalization.

data.name: numericBoxNormarizeRangeHigh.ToolTip
data.value: Upper bound (horizontal-axis units) of the range used to compute the normalization.

data.name: numericBoxNormarizeIntensity.ToolTip
data.value: Target intensity value (1-100000) the range's average/maximum is scaled to.

data.name: buttonApplyAllProfiles.Text
data.value: Apply for all profiles (without background setting)

data.name: buttonApplyAllProfiles.ToolTip
data.value: Apply the current processing settings to ALL profiles (background settings excluded).

data.name: radioButtonMutiplication.ToolTip
data.value: Select multiplication as the operation (the button shows no symbol; this is the multiply operator).

data.name: radioButtonDivision.ToolTip
data.value: Select division as the operation (the button shows no symbol; this is the divide operator).

data.name: numericalTextBoxTargetValue.ToolTip
data.value: Constant value combined with the profile in 'Profile and value' mode.

data.name: textBoxOutputFilename.ToolTip
data.value: Name given to the newly created result profile (trailing number auto-increments after each calculation).

data.name: buttonCalculate.ToolTip
data.value: Perform the selected operation and add the result as a new profile.

data.name: radioButtonAverage.ToolTip
data.value: Operator mode: average multiple selected profiles (with error propagation).

data.name: radioButtonProfileAndValue.ToolTip
data.value: Operator mode: combine one profile with a constant value (add or multiply).

data.name: radioButtonTwoProfiles.ToolTip
data.value: Operator mode: perform +, -, * or / between two selected profiles.
